name: search-before-build
description: An evidence-backed pre-build reality check for digital product and coding ideas.

interface.shortDescription: Decide whether to build, adapt, reuse, or stop.
interface.longDescription: A plain-language, evidence-backed workflow for deciding whether a digital product or coding idea is worth building before investing more time and tokens.
defaultPrompt: Assess whether I should build an app that organizes saved links.
Compare this project plan with existing alternatives.
